name: OnMediaRead
title: OnMediaRead
syntax: void OnMediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, long result, dword streamIndex, dword streamFlags, int64 timestamp, byte buffer[], dword length);
void OnMediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, long result, dword streamIndex, dword streamFlags, int64 timestamp, int buffer[], dword length);
void OnMediaRead(dword sourceReaderHandle, long result, dword streamIndex, dword streamFlags, int64 timestamp, long buffer[], dword length);
description: This callback is dispatched when an asynchronous read operation on a source reader completes.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The specific result code of the operation. If the operation completed success-fully the value is zero. Otherwise the value is non-zero.

parameters.name: streamIndex
parameters.description: The zero-based index of the stream that delivered the sample.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_ERROR0x00000001
parameters.description: An error occurred. If you receive this flag, do not make any further calls to SourceReader methods.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_ENDOFSTREAM0x00000002
parameters.description: The source reader reached the end of the stream.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_NEWSTREAM0x00000004
parameters.description: One or more new streams were created. Respond to this flag by doing at least one of the following: Set the output types on the new streams. Update the stream selection by selecting or deselecting streams.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_NATIVEMEDIATYPECHANGED0x00000010
parameters.description: The native format has changed for one or more streams. The native format is the format delivered by the media source before any decoders are inserted.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_CURRENTMEDIATYPECHANGED0x00000020
parameters.description: The current media has type changed for one or more streams. To get the current media type, call the source reader’s GetMediaType method.

parameters.name: MF_SOURCE_READERF_STREAMTICK0x00000100
parameters.description: There is a gap in the stream.

parameters.name: SOURCE_READERF_ALLEFFECTSREMOVED0x00000200
parameters.description: All transforms inserted by the application have been removed for a particular stream. This could be due to a dynamic format change from a source or decoder that prevents custom transforms from being used because they cannot handle the new media type.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer into which the data was stored.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the received data.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
